rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF LORRAINE JOYCE CHOY
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition Requesting Sanction Against Administrator Timothy P. Breen And His Attorney Baron L. Miller For Failure To Fulfill Their Fiduciary Duty To Get Court Confirmation Of A Monafide Offer Of $1.75 Million For 1/2 Interest Of 1360-1370 Pine St And Interfere With Our Close Of Escrow In March 14, 2017
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 5/29/18. The following tentative ruling was posted for the 5/15/18 hearing, which has not been addressed: "Petition will not be reviewed until it is amended to include a prayer, as well as facts and legal basis for the relief requested. Notice of Hearing on proper Judicial Council Form has not been filed. Proposed order has not been submitted." Only a "Status Hearing Statement" was filed on 5/10/18, which is insufficient. An AMENDED petition will need to be filed containing specific requests and legal basis to grant those requests by the probate court.
